metadata.description: EO MicroSaaS training marketplace — student-facing Claude Code plugin for the weekend-ship MVP workflow. Pair with EO-Brain (business brain) for full idea → shipped MVP pipeline.

plugins.name: eo-microsaas-dev
plugins.description: Weekend-ship MVP workflow for non-technical founders. Linear build chain /1-eo-dev-start → /2-eo-dev-plan → /3-eo-code → /4-eo-review → /5-eo-score → /6-eo-bridge-gaps → /7-eo-ship → /8-eo-retro (8 numbered, in order Fri eve → Sun night). 7 utilities un-numbered (/eo-debug, /eo-dev-repair, /eo-freeze, /eo-github, /eo-guide, /eo-status, /eo-unfreeze) — fire out-of-band. 11 skills. One-shot bootstrap asks the founder explicitly whether to use SaaSfast (yes/no), then — if yes — picks the right mode (M0–M3) from the BRD. Plan-mode gated. Self-scoring on ship + repair + debug. CEO-voice founder-facing artifacts. MENA checks (Arabic RTL, mobile 375px). BRD traceability from EO-Brain Phase 5. Hidden plumbing: gstack + superpowers (graceful degrade).
